videos.title: What is artificial intelligence? | Jonathan Mugan
videos.description: A clear, concise explanation of what AI is, its history, and its potential, presented in an engaging animated format suitable for absolute beginners. This video lays the groundwork for understanding AI's core concepts.

videos.title: What is Machine Learning?
videos.description: Introduces the fundamental concept of Machine Learning as a core component of AI, explaining how computers can learn from data without explicit programming in a simple and easy-to-understand way.

videos.title: What Is AI? | Artificial Intelligence Explained
videos.description: Provides a broad overview of AI, including its definition, key capabilities, different types (narrow, general, super), and real-world applications, making complex ideas accessible.

videos.title: What Is AI? | Artificial Intelligence In 5 Minutes | AI Explained | Simplilearn
videos.description: A rapid-fire introduction to Artificial Intelligence, covering its definition, history, types, and the exciting future applications of AI in a concise and digestible format, perfect for a quick comprehensive summary.
